message:
feat(bench): add MetaballsFx performance benchmarks (bd-l8x9.9.2)

Add comprehensive benchmarks for MetaballsFx visual effects:
- Render benchmarks across 80x24, 120x40, 240x80 sizes
- Quality level testing: Full, Reduced, Minimal
- Resize benchmarks (cold/warm cache)
- Time progression stability tests
- Ball count scaling analysis (1-12 balls)
- Palette comparison benchmarks

Performance results (within budget):
- 80x24 Full: ~48μs (budget: 500μs)
- 120x40 Full: ~200μs (budget: 1ms)
- 240x80 Full: ~650μs (budget: 4ms)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,6 +77,21 @@ name = "text_effects_bench"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["text-effects"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "metaballs_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["visual-fx"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "visual_fx_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["visual-fx"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "plasma_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["visual-fx"]
+
 [[test]]
 name = "backdrop_composition_tests"
 required-features = ["visual-fx"]
